ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Detailed information about the species' diet */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Description of the preferred habitat of the species */,
  "lifecycle" TEXT /* Information about the species' lifecycle, including breeding patterns and migration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site (e.g., Anacapa Island, California, United States) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the site */,
  "environmental_zone" TEXT /* Environmental zone where the site is located */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Land use around the site */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nearest weather station, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Pup count, Adult count) */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., Number, Percentage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series" (
  "time_series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time series */,
  "time_series_name" TEXT /* Name of the time series (e.g., Annual count, Monthly count) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the time series */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the data was collected */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the data pertains to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being measured */,
  "time_series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time series the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the metric value */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., field observation, satellite imagery) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the data point */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person or team who collected the data */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Status of data verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_time_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_series_id") REFERENCES time_series ("time_series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES collectors ("collector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, XLSX, JSON) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_species" (
  "site_species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site-species relationship */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the species was first observed at the site */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the species was last observed at the site */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the site-species relationship */,
  "population_trend" TEXT /* Trend in population */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey conducted for the species at the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_species_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_species_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental factor (e.g., Temperature, Sea level rise) */,
  "factor_type" TEXT /* Type of the environmental factor (e.g., Climate, Oceanography) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the environmental factor */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the environmental factor */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the environmental data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collectors" (
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collector */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the collector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the collector */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the collector is affiliated with */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the collector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)
